name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0017
purpose: Mount the first MixtarRVS rootfs.squashfs image read-only for inspection, verify required mounted paths, unmount it, and prove that /System/Current and boot state remain unchanged.
allowed_mutations: Temporarily mount rootfs.squashfs read-only for inspection.
Unmount the inspection mount before finishing.
non_goals: Do not mount the image as root.
Do not modify the image file.
Do not leave the image mounted.
postconditions: The mountpoint is not mounted after the stage.
known_limitations: The image is mounted for inspection only and then unmounted.
The image is still not booted.
No switch, rollback, bootloader, or garbage collection path is implemented by this stage.
The generated image still reflects compatibility layout from the current mutable source root.
